misc.title: The official English title of One Piece Episode 1169 is "The Legend Lurking in Elbaph – The Identity of the Mountain-Eater." The phrase "Legend Lurking" in the Japanese episode title is "潜む伝説" (Hisomu
misc.text: The official English title of One Piece Episode 1169 is "The Legend Lurking in Elbaph – The Identity of the Mountain-Eater." The phrase "Legend Lurking" in the Japanese episode title is "潜む伝説" (Hisomu Densetsu)—the exact same term Oda used in his message about the One Piece manga during Jump Festa 2018 (held in December 2017): "By the end of next year, I'll be introducing one of the legends lurking in the world of ONE PIECE to you. It's going to be the biggest enemy Luffy and his friends have ever had, and it's going to be the one that will stand in front of us. Whitebeard may be involved. Oh, I've talked too much. The Summit War? Can you believe that will end up looking cute?" It looks like one of those "Lurking Legends" has finally been confirmed to be Scopper Gaban, while the "biggest enemy" Oda referred to is most likely Imu, who was first introduced in silhouette form in the manga in 2018.

misc.title: OMGGGG!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) 🚨🇩🇪 BREAKING: Jürgen Klopp as new Germany head coach, here we go! 💥 Klopp has accepted to take over; long term contract details, project and
misc.text: OMGGGG!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) 🚨🇩🇪 BREAKING: Jürgen Klopp as new Germany head coach, here we go! 💥 Klopp has accepted to take over; long term contract details, project and RB Group exit still under discussion, but he will be the new head coach. RB considered Glasner as replacement but he signs at #NFFC. Klopp is back. — https://nitter.net/FabrizioRomano/status/2073704689523458076#m
